extraction.one_line_summary: SHACHMANN Maximilian won from breakaway after repeated accelerations shelled POZZOVIVO, while YATES Simon cracked on final climb losing 25-30 seconds when FROOME attacked.
tactical_patterns: Breakaway repeatedly accelerated each time POZZOVIVO bridged back, systematically destroying his mental state before final split.
FROOME attacked immediately after catching struggling group on final climb, exploiting YATES showing first weakness.
DUMOULIN followed POZZOVIVO wheel when pink jersey cracked rather than initiating attacks himself, revealing podium defense mode.

rider_signals.SHACHMANN Maximilian: positive: 24-year-old showed Grand Tour maturity by reading repeated acceleration pattern, timed final move perfectly at 3-up sprint
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: first visible crisis of Giro, lost wheel to podium group on final climb after looking infallible in previous stages
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: negative: bridged to break four times but each acceleration killed mental state, playing dangerous game
rider_signals.FROOME Christopher: positive: attacked when group caught stragglers rather than waiting, understood moment to exploit first YATES weakness
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: neutral: following wheels in podium group suggests defending position not attacking for stage win
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel: neutral: moved down in group positioning before final climb, conservative placement
